text.title: Survey Design Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: Hypothesis too short; question is leading + loaded; questions array missing type/required; target N below 120 floor; bias_lint_passed and pilot_complete missing.

list.pattern: Question that signals the desired answer.
